entries.title: Doc-drift detection flow
entries.description: PM detects doc drift, DocM fixes. PM→DocM→DeployM flow for doc-code alignment.

entries.title: File registry
entries.description: DocM maintains file registry via src/docm_registry.py. Persistent cross-session file tracking.

entries.title: CLAUDE.md is auto-loaded — keep it canonical and current
entries.description: CLAUDE.md is automatically loaded by Claude Code at session start. It is the single source of truth for agent rules, model routing, project structure, and build commands. When workflows or commands change, CLAUDE.md must be updated first. DocM is responsible for catching CLAUDE.md drift against code. Current gap: SM --type mcp|agent flag is not yet shown in the CLAUDE.md SM_TARGETS command example (added in sm_select_targets.py but CLAUDE.md shows only --limit --output-ids).

entries.title: SM --type flag: CLAUDE.md command example needs update
entries.description: CLAUDE.md Build Commands shows: SM_TARGETS=$(python3 scripts/review/sm_select_targets.py --limit 100 --output-ids). This is incomplete — --type mcp|agent is now a supported and important flag. CLAUDE.md should show both the default form and the type-filtered form. DocM should update on next PM instruction.
